_comment: El Sanatorio Web — push config. PIVOTED 2026-06-23 PM from Firebase v1 HTTP API (blocked by org policy on service account keys) to pure Web Push Protocol with VAPID. The vapidKey below is the fresh keypair public — server-side has the matching private key as VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY env var. Firebase config block retained for future Firestore/Auth use but not required for push.
